response.justification: Although Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background at top-tier tech companies like Google and Meta, his profile does not align with the core requirements of this role. He lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows, possessing only brief C/C++ experience from nearly a decade ago. Furthermore, while he has some fintech exposure, he lacks the required Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking domain expertise necessary for this position.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta).
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, test-driven development, and modern software craftsmanship.
Demonstrated leadership and architectural skills across diverse technology stacks.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience, especially on Windows.
Missing required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking.
Recent technology stack heavily leans towards TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than C++ and enterprise SQL databases.
